MAT_HFLD_AgedBrassHero.note: Aged brass for hero rings, gauges, rails, pipe collars, and polished wear edges.

MAT_HFLD_BlackenedRivetedIron.note: Blackened iron plates with grime-dark rivets and chipped edges.

MAT_HFLD_OilWetStone.note: Wet oil-dark masonry and floor slabs with reflective puddled low points.

MAT_HFLD_GreenOxidizedCopper.note: Verdigris over copper for older service lines and oxidized machinery.

MAT_HFLD_AmberGlassLit.note: Warm amber glass for lamps, enemy eyes, furnace cores, and sight glows.

MAT_HFLD_LeatherGripDark.note: Dark worn leather for pistol grips, straps, bellows, and wrapped handles.

MAT_HFLD_CreamGaugeFace.note: Aged enamel pressure gauge faces with dark printed ticks and red needles.

MAT_HFLD_CopperCoilHot.note: Warm copper coils and exposed pressure conduits.
